The '''''Xamaural''''' was the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] that picked up [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|16|The Long, Bad Day}}
